global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a prominent headline and call-to-action.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection with a reward offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VantaStyle' in a modern font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small text label that reads 'UGC', indicating user-generated content, located near the logo.

elements.label: Circular icons
elements.description: Two circular icons that are empty or have a simple design, placed below the logo and UGC label.

elements.label: Rectangular placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular placeholder graphic that is empty or has a simple design, located below the circular icons.

elements.label: New collection drop
elements.description: A bold headline text that reads 'New collection drop', prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: New collection drop Fre 625 Claim reward

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A call-to-action button that says 'Claim reward', designed to attract attention and encourage interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo and UGC label are at the top, followed by decorative elements, with the headline at the bottom and the CTA button below it.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VantaStyle UGC, New collection drop, Free shipping over $25, Claim reward
